value_signal: Open Superteam bounty with 2,000 USDC total prizes and a 700/500/350/250/200 USDC split across five winners.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Superteam lists the bounty as Global; submission eligibility and platform account requirements still need confirmation before any entry.
deadline_or_currentness: Current Superteam feed shows the bounty as due in 6d/9d and the sponsor announcement is scheduled for July 7, 2026.
evidence_gate: Submitted entry plus platform acceptance or winner announcement and any later USDC payout evidence.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a content angle, explainer thread, and short promo asset set for Margin.Trade using only public product details.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must sign in to Superteam and submit the best-fit content/design package.
automation_boundary: No login, Superteam submission, Telegram outreach, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, or payment data.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The bounty is open, but no submission, acceptance, winner notice, or payout has been verified.
risk_flags: Platform submission required; no public email surfaced on the listing.
known_blockers: The contact path is public Telegram and the payout still depends on platform review.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, payout, or usable value delivery.
